topics.title: Create a group using the Participant Administration utility.

content.text: Create a group using the Participant Administration utility.

Create groups to organize users or other groups. Working with groups simplifies the administration of Windchill and the ability to maintainadministrative policies. For example, you can assign a license to a group; if you add a user to this group, they will inherit the same licenses allocated to the group, as long as there are licenses available.

topics.title: Exercise — Create a Group

content.text: In this exercise you will create a Group.

content.alt: The Participation Administration Table is shown and the Create a New Group Icon is called out.  Your New Group is present in the table and is outlined.
content.caption: Participant Administration Table

content.title: Create a Group
content.objective: Complete the create a group procedure.

steps.action: Click the Participant Administration link in the Business Administration section of the Utilities page.
Click the Create new group icon at the top of the Participant Administration table.
Type the name of your group in the Name field.
Optional: Type information in the Description field.
